title: TaskGraphGsd
description: Output of the gsd pipeline's decompose_gsd step. Extends the bare TaskGraph (from build.stratum.yaml's decompose) with required produces/consumes per task, sourced from the blueprint's Boundary Map. Each task carries a rich `description` string pre-baked with the spec context that Stratum's parallel_dispatch interpolation cannot carry on its own.

files_owned.description: Files this task may write. Must not overlap with other tasks' files_owned (enforced by no_file_conflicts ensure).

files_read.description: Files this task may read but not write.

depends_on.description: Task ids that must complete before this one.

description.description: Rich prompt fragment containing the per-task spec context (produces/consumes/slice/upstream summary/gates). Packed at decompose time because Stratum's parallel_dispatch only interpolates a fixed set of tokens.

produces.description: Symbols this task lands. Sourced from the matching Boundary Map slice.

consumes.description: Symbols this task may import from upstream tasks (resolved at end-of-step merge in topological order).
